query_title: Batman vs Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! & Batman: The Brave and the Bold
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Action, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Inc. gang meet up with Batman and other friends to defeat evil villains and save the day.

recommendations.title: The Death of Superman
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Drama, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: When a hulking monster arrives on Earth and begins a mindless rampage, the Justice League is quickly called in to stop it. But it soon becomes apparent that only Superman can stand against the monstrosity.

recommendations.title: The Death and Return of Superman
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Animation, Action, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Death of Superman and Reign of the Supermen now presented as an over two-hour unabridged and seamless animated feature. Witness the no-holds-barred battle between the Justice League and an unstoppable alien force known only as Doomsday, a battle

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Action, Comedy, Family
recommendations.overview: The Turtles and the Shredder battle once again, this time for the last cannister of the ooze that created the Turtles, which Shredder wants to create an army of new mutants. Meanwhile Splinter is coming... to a decision.

recommendations.title: Reign of the Supermen
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Fantasy, Drama
recommendations.overview: In the wake of The Death of Superman, the world is still mourning the loss of the Man of Steel following his fatal battle with the monster Doomsday. However, no sooner as his body been laid to rest than do four new bearers of the Superman shield come

recommendations.title: Turtles Forever
recommendations.overview: Whoa, dude! Worlds collide when the Turtles from one dimension meet the Turtles from another dimension! What the shell is going on? The two Turtle teams must work together to find the Technodrome and undo this multi-dimensional mess!

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Justice League vs. Teen Titans
recommendations.overview: Robin is sent by Batman to work with the Teen Titans after his volatile behavior botches up a Justice League mission. The Titans must then step up to face Trigon after he possesses the League and threatens to conquer the world.

recommendations.title: Batman: Bad Blood
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Animation, Adventure, Crime
recommendations.overview: When Batman goes missing, it takes the entire Bat "family" - including Batwoman and Batwing - to keep the peace in Gotham and unravel the mystery behind the Dark Knight's disappearance.

recommendations.title: Daredevil vs. Spider-Man
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Action, Crime, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Man and Daredevil team up to fight Kingpin.
